news.title:
Marco Agnolin, ex-Zara Italy leader, becomes CEO of Own'd under Aditya Birla Fashion.
He has held CEO roles at Bershka and Diesel, leading key strategies.
news.summary:
Marco Agnolin, ex-Zara Italy leader, becomes CEO of Own'd under Aditya Birla Fashion.
He has held CEO roles at Bershka and Diesel, leading key strategies.

news.title: Aditya Birla Fashion appoints Nikhil Modha as CFO designate from April 1, 2026.
news.summary: Aditya Birla Fashion appoints Nikhil Modha as CFO designate from April 1, 2026.

news.title:
Aditya Birla Fashion and Retail Ltd (ABFRL) reported Q3 FY26 revenue growth of 8% YoY to INR 2,374 crore, with EBITDA margins improving to 15.6% from 14.9% YoY.
Pantaloons showed a 3% LTL growth adjusted for festive/EOSS shifts, while ethnic business expanded 20% YoY with margins at 22.7%. Losses narrowed to INR 115 crore normalized.
news.summary:
Aditya Birla Fashion and Retail Ltd (ABFRL) reported Q3 FY26 revenue growth of 8% YoY to INR 2,374 crore, with EBITDA margins improving to 15.6% from 14.9% YoY.
Pantaloons showed a 3% LTL growth adjusted for festive/EOSS shifts, while ethnic business expanded 20% YoY with margins at 22.7%. Losses narrowed to INR 115 crore normalized.

news.title:
TCNS margins rose 500 bps due to better products, retail execution.
YTD pre-Ind AS losses dropped 50%, aiming for medium-term double-digit margins.
news.summary:
TCNS margins rose 500 bps due to better products, retail execution.
YTD pre-Ind AS losses dropped 50%, aiming for medium-term double-digit margins.

news.title:
ABFRL expects profitability from next year; TMRW targets break-even by FY29.
Galeries Lafayette projects INR 150-200 Cr revenue with 20% profitability over time.
news.summary:
ABFRL expects profitability from next year; TMRW targets break-even by FY29.
Galeries Lafayette projects INR 150-200 Cr revenue with 20% profitability over time.

news.title:
ABFRL's Pantaloon targets mid-high single-digit L2L growth, double-digit overall growth.
TCNS plans 50-60 new stores, targeting double-digit growth; OWNED aims for 40-50 stores by FY '29.
news.summary:
ABFRL's Pantaloon targets mid-high single-digit L2L growth, double-digit overall growth.
TCNS plans 50-60 new stores, targeting double-digit growth; OWNED aims for 40-50 stores by FY '29.

news.title:
Aditya Birla Fashion and Retail (ABFRL) approved the merger of two wholly-owned subsidiaries, Jaypore and TG Apparel & Decor.
The merger aims for operational simplification, cost reduction, and enhanced financial flexibility without altering ABFRL's shareholding.
news.summary:
Aditya Birla Fashion and Retail (ABFRL) approved the merger of two wholly-owned subsidiaries, Jaypore and TG Apparel & Decor.
The merger aims for operational simplification, cost reduction, and enhanced financial flexibility without altering ABFRL's shareholding.

news.title:
ABFRL reported Q3 net loss of ₹152.2 crore, wider than ₹51.3 crore YoY; revenue grew 7.9% to ₹2,373.6 crore.
EBITDA rose 2.4% to ₹308.6 crore; EBITDA margin declined to 13% from 13.7%. Shares ended 3% higher but fell 6% YTD.
news.summary:
ABFRL reported Q3 net loss of ₹152.2 crore, wider than ₹51.3 crore YoY; revenue grew 7.9% to ₹2,373.6 crore.
EBITDA rose 2.4% to ₹308.6 crore; EBITDA margin declined to 13% from 13.7%. Shares ended 3% higher but fell 6% YTD.

news.title:
Aditya Birla Fashion's Q3 net loss widened to ₹1.5B from ₹513M YoY.
Revenue increased to ₹24B from ₹22B YoY, showing growth despite losses.
news.summary:
Aditya Birla Fashion's Q3 net loss widened to ₹1.5B from ₹513M YoY.
Revenue increased to ₹24B from ₹22B YoY, showing growth despite losses.

news.title:
Aditya Birla Fashion announces CEO change; Anant Kumar Daga resigns from TCNS Division effective April 30, 2026.
Sooraj Bhat, current CEO of Ethnic Business, will take over TCNS responsibilities from May 1, 2026.
news.summary:
Aditya Birla Fashion announces CEO change; Anant Kumar Daga resigns from TCNS Division effective April 30, 2026.
Sooraj Bhat, current CEO of Ethnic Business, will take over TCNS responsibilities from May 1, 2026.

news.title:
ABFRL's subsidiary invested INR 42.38 Cr in Wrogn Pvt Ltd, acquiring 2.53% stake for INR 6.57 Cr.
A primary capital infusion of INR 35.8 Cr was made; Wrogn's FY25 revenue was INR 223.2 Cr.
news.summary:
ABFRL's subsidiary invested INR 42.38 Cr in Wrogn Pvt Ltd, acquiring 2.53% stake for INR 6.57 Cr.
A primary capital infusion of INR 35.8 Cr was made; Wrogn's FY25 revenue was INR 223.2 Cr.

news.title:
Aditya Birla Digital Fashion Ventures Ltd invested in Wrogn, acquiring 2.53% for INR 6.57 Cr and INR 35.81 Cr via OCRPS.
Wrogn, a fashion brand, reported FY25 revenue of INR 223.23 Cr. The acquisition expands ABDFVL's digital-first brand portfolio.
news.summary:
Aditya Birla Digital Fashion Ventures Ltd invested in Wrogn, acquiring 2.53% for INR 6.57 Cr and INR 35.81 Cr via OCRPS.
Wrogn, a fashion brand, reported FY25 revenue of INR 223.23 Cr. The acquisition expands ABDFVL's digital-first brand portfolio.

news.title:
Aditya Birla Fashion faces Rs 217 lakh demand from customs over IGST dispute.
The company plans to legally contest the demand order at CESTAT.
news.summary:
Aditya Birla Fashion faces Rs 217 lakh demand from customs over IGST dispute.
The company plans to legally contest the demand order at CESTAT.

news.title: Aditya Birla Fashion shares fell 8% after equity deals worth ₹289 crore.
news.summary: Aditya Birla Fashion shares fell 8% after equity deals worth ₹289 crore.

news.title:
Aditya Birla Fashion plans to sell 3% stake via block deal worth $32M.
The deal starts at ₹65.78/share, 8.5% below current market price.
news.summary:
Aditya Birla Fashion plans to sell 3% stake via block deal worth $32M.
The deal starts at ₹65.78/share, 8.5% below current market price.

news.title:
Aditya Birla Fashion & Retail's Q3 retail segment grew 46% YoY; consolidated revenue rose 35.6%.
eCommerce operations increased 138% YoY, contributing 5.1% of total revenue.
news.summary:
Aditya Birla Fashion & Retail's Q3 retail segment grew 46% YoY; consolidated revenue rose 35.6%.
eCommerce operations increased 138% YoY, contributing 5.1% of total revenue.

news.title:
Aditya Birla Fashion faces a tax demand of ₹132.9 crore from Haryana tax authority.
The company denies charges, plans to appeal against the demand order.
news.summary:
Aditya Birla Fashion faces a tax demand of ₹132.9 crore from Haryana tax authority.
The company denies charges, plans to appeal against the demand order.

news.title:
Pilani Investment acquired 2.44 crore shares of Aditya Birla Fashion.
The purchases occurred in the open market between Dec 23-29.
news.summary:
Pilani Investment acquired 2.44 crore shares of Aditya Birla Fashion.
The purchases occurred in the open market between Dec 23-29.

news.title:
Aditya Birla Fashion faced a tax demand of ₹13.8 crore over input tax credit mismatch.
The company plans to appeal, stating no current financial or operational impact.
news.summary:
Aditya Birla Fashion faced a tax demand of ₹13.8 crore over input tax credit mismatch.
The company plans to appeal, stating no current financial or operational impact.

news.title:
CGST Chandigarh issued a tax demand of ₹1.49 Cr with ₹13,715 interest and ₹14.9 Cr penalty to Aditya Birla Fashion.
The dispute involves excess input tax credit due to vendor default; the company plans to appeal, deeming it invalid.
news.summary:
CGST Chandigarh issued a tax demand of ₹1.49 Cr with ₹13,715 interest and ₹14.9 Cr penalty to Aditya Birla Fashion.
The dispute involves excess input tax credit due to vendor default; the company plans to appeal, deeming it invalid.
